Scripts.OnLoad: self.SetAutoRotation=function(model,speed) model.autorotationspeed=tonumber(speed) or 0 model.facing=0 end self.SetModels=function(model,models) model.models=type(models)=="table" and models or {models}; if model.models[1] then model:ShowModel(model.models[1]) end end self.ShowModel=function(model,display) if display then model:SetDisplayInfo(display) end model:RefreshCamera() end self.SetSlideshow=function(model,seconds) model.slideshow=tonumber(seconds) model.slideElapsed=0 model.slideIndex=1 end
Scripts.OnUpdate: if self.autorotationspeed then self.facing=(self.facing or 0)+elapsed*self.autorotationspeed self:SetFacing(self.facing) end if self.slideshow and self.models and #self.models>0 then self.slideElapsed=(self.slideElapsed or 0)+elapsed if self.slideElapsed>=self.slideshow then self.slideIndex=(self.slideIndex or 1)%#self.models+1 self:ShowModel(self.models[self.slideIndex]) self.slideElapsed=0 end end

Scripts.OnEnter: if self.tooltiptext then GameTooltip:SetOwner(self,"ANCHOR_TOPLEFT") GameTooltip:SetText(self.tooltiptext) GameTooltip:Show() end

Scripts.OnLoad: if ZygorGuidesViewer.ButtonSets and ZygorGuidesViewer.ButtonSets.Minimap then ZygorGuidesViewer.ButtonSets.Minimap.NORMAL:AssignToButton(self) end
